reviews.comment:
El espacio es demasiado pequeño ,deberían modificar la playa.Hay demasiados inconvenientes si hay varios usuarios que deseen cargar combustible .Y,más que una parte es calzada publica

(Translated by Google)
The space is too small; they should modify the beach area. There are too many inconveniences if several users want to refuel. And, more than part of it is a public road.
